about.name: Abhinav Rai
about.about: Hi, I am a Senior Software Engineer with 9+ years of experience building scalable, high-performance frontend systems. I have strong expertise in React-based architectures, micro-frontends, pricing platforms, and payment flows, with a proven track record of leading frontend initiatives, improving delivery velocity, and shipping business-critical features under tight timelines.

description: Led frontend development for Pricing V4 and V5, managing a team of 6 engineers and owning delivery of pricing and checkout flows.
Pricing V5: Migrated to a single-vertical, add-on–based pricing model, launching a new Pro plan (between Business and Enterprise) and a new sales package; delivered end-to-end in 6 months.
Integrated Adyen and Stripe payment gateways, enabling scalable, multi-country payment support.
Designed and scaled micro-frontend architecture using Webpack Module Federation, ensuring shared navigation and independent team ownership.
Improved Lighthouse scores from 50 to 90+, reduced bundle size by 60%, and improved FCP by 40% through lazy loading and code splitting.
Ensured production stability during Brevo rebranding, coordinating frontend theme changes and QA validation on the new domain.
Developed end-to-end V2 pricing and checkout journeys, focusing on state management and API integration.
Decoupled pricing frontend from a Symphony-based monolith, creating a dedicated React repository with full frontend ownership.
Architected reusable shared UI bundles as libraries, reducing cross-team dependencies and release timelines.
Integrated PayPal and Direct Debit payment methods across pricing and checkout flows.
Optimized legacy React components, improving application responsiveness and maintainability.
Built Afinoz’s main website using React and MaterializeCSS, reducing homepage load time from 9s to 0.8s.
Led development of Personal Loan, Business Loan, eligibility, application, blog, and bank pages.
Implemented SEO optimizations using dynamic JSON-LDs and Node.js scripts for content scraping and sitemap generation.
Developed an in-house CMS with a rich text editor for non-technical content management.
Built an internal CRM dashboard using Chart.js, Redux-Persist, and local storage caching.

experience.description: Worked on Laravel based Web development project named Samarpan where I have to develop the whole UI using Materialize Bootstrap.
Worked as an Intern. Integrated Stripe Payment Gateway.

education.name: Ajay Kumar Garg Engineering College, (AKTU | UPTU)

projects.title: Billing flow module
projects.description: Worked on a complete user journey from plan selection to payment. The main focus was to create reusable components, optimization. Created a mono-repo from common code which can be easily used by other projects too.

projects.title: Campaign checker
projects.description: Created a React-based pre-check email campaign tool to avoid errors in the campaign. It was two days competition where we have to finalize the idea and execute it. This tool provides facilities like spell-check, personalization check, broken-link check, missing alt tag of images, available credits check.

projects.title: React17-webpack5-boilerplate
projects.description: React17, webpack5, SASS, Eslint and many things to kick start a new project

projects.title: AFINOZ website
projects.description: Develop FrontEnd of Website using ReactJs, optimize website performance, API Integration. Create Custom templates for the same type of pages.

projects.title: CRM-Afinoz
projects.description: Develop FrontEnd of CRM using ReactJs/Redux, ChartJs and MaterializeCSS. Create customizable components which can be used in multiple containers, integrate APIs.

projects.title: CMS-Afinoz
projects.description: Develop CMS using rich text-editor, ReactJs and MaterializeCSS. Integrate related APIs.

projects.title: E-Petition
projects.description: It's a Web project to sign online petitions. Learned code-igniter and developer this portal in one week. Technologies used Php-CodeIgniter, MySql, HTML, CSS, Material Design Lite, JavaScript, Jquery, Ajax.

projects.title: Samarpan
projects.description: It's a Laravel based web development project for using Senior citizens experience in Industries. My job is to create FrontEnd of the whole portal using Materialize-Bootstrap.

projects.title: Question Paper Portal
projects.description: It is a Modal Question Paper Upload Portal where faculty will upload their question with answers and students can see those questions online or download them. Technologies is using HTML/CSS, JavaScript, Jquery, PHP/MySql, BootStrap, CK-Editor.
